title: ライスちゃんとがんばる！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, I pass by an arcade downtown to find...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Today's the day! I'm gonna win that ice cream
cushion!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I really shouldn't be here, then...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Huh, why's that? It's always more fun when you're
around, Rice! I wanna do it together!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: But... I'll just bring you misfortune again.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Remember our lunch today? Our food got stolen
by a stray cat.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh, yeah. That was so funny! We got to eat and play with the cat at the same time!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'll handle the claw! You stand next to me
and tell me what to do! Aaand go!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Wh-what? You want me to... Uh, um, er, I'll try!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Grrr! I thought I had it just now! Next time I'll get
it for suresies!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
U-Urara! You only have enough money for one
more try!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
You were trying so hard too... If only there was
something I could do!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! A blackout! Everything's gone dark!
Ahaha, I can't see anything!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Not right on your last try! It must be because
I'm here...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh! The lights are back on!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh wow! Look, Rice! The claw's super fast now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It may be due to the sudden power outage, but
the claw machine's arm is moving around with
incredible speed.

text_block_list.name: Arcade Employee
text_block_list.text:
My apologies! It seems to be malfunctioning. I'll
fix it at once!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, that employee's gonna give us the cushion!
I think he said it was an apology because there
are bugs in the machine? How nice!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'm the one who caused you trouble, though. I'm
so sorry.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huh? Now you're apologizing too? Why? Didn't you have fun today?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I know I had a blast! Like, there was a blackout, and then the claw was zooming everywhere. It was so fun!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Everything is always so much better when you're
here! Let's hang out again soon!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: U-Urara... Okay... Thank you very much!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I love hanging out with you too!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Great! Then let's hang out all the time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just watching Haru Urara and Rice Shower
interact warms my heart.
